$description: BIM KEY PLANS token category — authoritative catalog of all Woodfine BIM Object Key Plans. A Key Plan is the smallest BIM Object unit: a spatial program defined by real furniture placement (manufacturer SKUs), three-zone cross-section (Zone 1 Habitat / Zone 2 Magazine / Zone 3 Corridor), net leasable area, facade frontage, and accessibility compliance. Key Plans are authored by architects from Woodfine equipment programs; the tool-buildingwidth Rust engine nests them into Tiles and Floor Plates. IFC anchor: IfcSpace (each Key Plan is a bounded, named space within a floor storey). Source: CONSTRUCTION_2026_01_06_Key Plan_Professional Office_FFE_FIN.xlsx — tab Summary_Key Plans (V3, 2025-11-29). Note: approximate square footages per source spreadsheet.

private-office.$description: Private Office — facade-facing individual leaseholds. Three sizes share the same zone depths; frontage width increases with size, not Zone 2 depth. Building ID issued per desk. Zone 1 enforces the European Lighting Standard (6 m desk-to-window). Zone 2 holds filing, credenza, bookshelf. Zone 3 is the shared corridor.

compliance.european_lighting_standard: Zone 1 = 6.0 m satisfies 6 m desk-to-window rule
compliance.wheelchair_clearance: 1200 mm turning radius at desk and table confirmed
compliance.german_circulation_law: 900 mm clear passage at door swing
compliance.building_id: issued per desk — minimum 1 per PO-1

$value.design_notes: Desks placed perpendicular to facade require +0.7 m in Zone 1 for three desks in series. Zone 2 depth is identical across PO-1 / PO-2 / PO-3 — only facade frontage increases with size.
$value.tile_role: component — nests into 2700 SF Tile with other Private Office Key Plans

small.$description: Private Office — Small. 30.19 m² / 325 SF. Zone 1 = 6.0 m, Zone 2 = 3.8 m, Zone 3 = 2.0 m. Steelcase Leigh desk + round table + 2 side chairs + filing + credenza + bookshelf + coat rack. European Lighting Standard compliant.

compliance.european_lighting_standard: Zone 1 = 6.0 m satisfies 6 m desk-to-window rule
compliance.wheelchair_clearance: 1200 mm turning radius confirmed at desk and meeting table
compliance.german_circulation_law: 900 mm clear passage at door swing

medium.$description: Private Office — Medium. 43.20 m² / 465 SF. Zone 1 = 6.0 m, Zone 2 = 3.8 m, Zone 3 = 2.0 m. Wider frontage than Small; same zone depths.

compliance.european_lighting_standard: Zone 1 = 6.0 m satisfies 6 m desk-to-window rule
compliance.wheelchair_clearance: 1200 mm turning radius confirmed at desk, table head, and table ends
compliance.german_circulation_law: 900 mm clear passage at door swing

$value.tile_role: component — nests into 2700 SF Tile or 6000 SF End-Cap Tile

large.$description: Private Office — Large. 63.64 m² / 685 SF. Zone 1 = 6.0 m, Zone 2 = 3.8 m, Zone 3 = 2.0 m. Widest frontage of the Private Office series; accommodates 8-person boardroom table.

corporate-office.$description: Corporate Office — full-floor and fractional-floor leaseholds. Dimensions are a proportion of the Floor Plate; independent Key Plan dimensions are not defined at this stage. Architect sizes Corporate Office against confirmed Floor Plate dimensions.

$value.design_notes: Sized as proportion of Floor Plate. No sub-lease; one climate zone per Tile.

full-floor.$description: Corporate Office — Full Floor. Size TBD — floor-plate dependent. Internal tile code CO-A.

half-floor.$description: Corporate Office — Half Floor. Size TBD — floor-plate dependent. Internal tile code CO-B.

third-floor.$description: Corporate Office — Third Floor. Size TBD — floor-plate dependent. Internal tile code CO-C.

quarter-floor.$description: Corporate Office — Quarter Floor. Size TBD — floor-plate dependent. Internal tile code CO-D.

eighth-floor.$description: Corporate Office — Eighth Floor. Size TBD — floor-plate dependent. Minimum viable Corporate Office Tile. Internal tile code CO-E.

medical.$description: Professional Office — Medical. Wider Zone 1 (7.2 m) than other sub-types to accommodate exam-table depth and patient + clinician circulation. ADA / CSA-B651 corridor width. Key rooms: reception, exam / dental chairs, file room, autoclave, sterilization, imaging, storage, washroom. Furniture: Midmark examination tables.

chiropractor.$description: Medical — Chiropractor. 223 m² / 2,401 SF. Zone 1 = 7.20 m, Zone 2 = 4.87 m. 2 exam rooms. Reception, file room, autoclave, storage, washroom.

dentist.$description: Medical — Dentist. 331 m² / 3,568 SF. Zone 1 = 7.20 m, Zone 2 = 4.87 m. 4 dental chairs. Reception, sterilization, imaging, storage, washroom.

general-practitioner.$description: Medical — General Practitioner. 486 m² / 5,231 SF. Zone 1 = 7.20 m, Zone 2 = 4.87 m. 6 exam rooms. Full clinical suite with imaging and sterilization.

business.$description: Professional Office — Business. Widest Zone 2 Magazine (7.3 m) across all Professional Office sub-types — reflects open storage walls, server rooms, print areas, and team collaboration zones. Width options A–D available per size. Total facade frontage range: 25.3 m – 32.3 m.

small.$description: Business — Small. 311.22 m² / 3,350 SF. Zone 1 = 6.00 m, Zone 2 = 7.30 m, Zone 3 = 2.75 m. Width options A–D.

medium.$description: Business — Medium. 399.66 m² / 4,301 SF. Zone 1 = 6.00 m, Zone 2 = 7.30 m, Zone 3 = 2.75 m.

large.$description: Business — Large. 669.00 m² / 7,201 SF. Zone 1 = 6.00 m, Zone 2 = 7.30 m, Zone 3 = 2.90 m. Widest Zone 3 in Business series.

laboratory.$description: Professional Office — Laboratory. Wider Zone 1 (6.78 m) than standard Professional Office to accommodate bench depth and fume hood clearances per German Circulation Law. IBC high-hazard occupancy egress width (3.048 m / 10'0") in Zone 3. Key rooms: reception, 1–2 offices, 3–9 benches, staff room, storage, mechanical, clean room.

compliance.german_circulation_law: Zone 1 = 6.78 m satisfies bench depth + fume hood clearance
compliance.ibc_high_hazard: Zone 3 = 3.10 m satisfies IBC high-hazard egress width (3.048 m)

medical.$description: Laboratory — Medical. 195.00 m² / 2,099 SF. Zone 1 = 6.78 m, Zone 2 = 4.80 m, Zone 3 = 3.10 m. Frontage ~16.8 m. 3 benches. Occupancy: 34 (5.7 m²/pp).

research.$description: Laboratory — Research. 315.96 m² / 3,401 SF. Zone 1 = 6.78 m, Zone 2 = 4.80 m, Zone 3 = 3.10 m. Frontage ~27.3 m. 6 benches. Occupancy: 49 (6.4 m²/pp).

large.$description: Laboratory — Large. 400.69 m² / 4,313 SF. Zone 1 = 6.78 m, Zone 2 = 4.80 m, Zone 3 = 3.10 m. Frontage ~34.6 m. 9 benches. Occupancy: 61 (6.5 m²/pp).

academic.$description: Professional Office — Academic. Shorter Zone 1 (4.7 m) than other sub-types — seating faces forward toward a podium or screen, not toward the facade. No bilateral corridor; suites open to the building corridor. Configurations: seminar / podium (Small), multi-use seminar (Medium), tiered auditorium (Large).

small.$description: Academic — Small. 105 m² / 1,131 SF. Zone 1 = 4.70 m, Zone 2 = 3.00 m. Seminar / podium configuration. Occupancy: 21–25.

medium.$description: Academic — Medium. 240 m² / 2,583 SF. Zone 1 = 4.70 m, Zone 2 = 3.00 m. Multi-use seminar configuration. Occupancy: 63.

large.$description: Academic — Large. 378 m² / 4,070 SF. Zone 1 = 4.70 m, Zone 2 = 3.00 m. Tiered auditorium ~60-seat configuration. Occupancy: 82–103.

civic.$description: Professional Office — Civic. Government services, community programming, and social services. Widest Zone 2 Magazine (7.23 m) for public records and secure areas. ADA / accessible-route compliance mandatory throughout leasehold. Key rooms: offices, clerk desks, conference rooms, staff room, restrooms, communal corridor.

small.$description: Civic — Small. 270 m² / 2,912 SF. Zone 1 = 6.00 m, Zone 2 = 7.23 m.

medium.$description: Civic — Medium. 577 m² / 6,215 SF. Zone 1 = 6.00 m, Zone 2 = 7.23 m.

large.$description: Civic — Large. 822 m² / 8,850 SF. Zone 1 = 6.00 m, Zone 2 = 7.23 m. Largest single-leasehold Civic Key Plan.
